title: Order No. 50 of 2022 Regarding Confidentiality of Data Relating to Criminal Proceedings and Judgments
summary: Sets safeguards restricting disclosure, publication, transmission, broadcasting, trading, or provision of data relating to criminal cases, proceedings, and judgments, including requirements for protective technical systems.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Protects confidentiality of criminal proceedings data.
